approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and prove the pipe is real without unsafe automation.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub Synthesis Scope readback showing proof scope, scheduled real-corpus refresh scope, job status, and no-run/no-model boundaries.
constraints: Do not run intelligence:synthesis-refresh, intelligence:synthesis-proof, embeddings, model/provider calls, live extraction, source sync, transcript fetch, browser work, screenshots, OCR, downloads, or external writes.
Do not write synthesis rows, atoms, chunks, facts, routes, backlog cards, Scoper cards, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, or approval records from this readback.
Do not propose, approve, apply, reject, snooze, reroute, or promote live action routes.
Do not auto-promote Director recommendations into backlog, Scoper, Portfolio, or Current Sprint.
Do not send Telegram, email, Slack, Agent Feedback, public messages, or Harlan notifications outside the governed ship gate.
Fail proof if scheduled refresh is represented as using the 8-item proof scope or if the readback starts synthesis/model work.
